2266880.name: Senpai Puzzle: Waifu Summer - Background Waifus Pack
2266880.description:
Add 17 new background Summer Waifus for a total of 19!

On the main menu you can hide the menu to get a closer look at your new background Summer Waifus.
Press 1 or 2 on your keyboard to cycle through your background Summer Waifu collection!
